status_message: No human-approved AI assessment exists. The human-triggered ChatGPT workflow, its input and output contracts, its rejection rules and its approval gate are implemented and tested, but producing an assessment requires a human to run a package through ChatGPT out-of-band. This section shows only human-approved assessments, so it is empty rather than speculative.
boundary_note: This repository calls no AI API. High or Critical conclusions can never be published without an explicit human-review record.

deterministic_outlooks.lane_name: Thailand ↔ Mainland China and Hong Kong

base_case.narrative: Thailand ↔ Mainland China and Hong Kong currently reads as deteriorating across the nine assessed domains, with the freight benchmark and transit-time and service evidence deteriorating No operational event is currently open against this lane. 1 of nine domains have insufficient evidence, so the reading is partial.

trigger_conditions.condition: any source backing this lane changes freshness state, or a new official notice is recorded against a node or chokepoint the lane includes
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the source-health snapshot and the official notice channels

data_gaps: Overall source coverage is insufficient: no source in the registry is enabled, so every reading below is derived from labelled synthetic fixtures and describes the platform's behaviour, not the real world.
base_case.point_forecast_disclaimer: No numeric forecast is given for freight, transit time, inventory or cost. No qualified dataset in this registry would support one.

deterioration_case.narrative: A deterioration case for Thailand ↔ Mainland China and Hong Kong would show the domains below crossing their documented thresholds in the adverse direction, or an operating authority extending a restriction that affects this lane. The triggers state what would have to be observed; no magnitude or date is asserted here.

trigger_conditions.condition: thailand_trade_value year over year change falls to or below -7.5 percent (rule TH-TRADE-YOY-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the thailand_trade_value observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: port_throughput_volume year over year change falls to or below -7.5 percent (rule PORT-VOLUME-YOY-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the port_throughput_volume observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: container_freight_benchmark month over month change rises to or above +5.0 percent (rule FREIGHT-BENCHMARK-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the container_freight_benchmark observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: retail_or_bunker_fuel_price month over month change rises to or above +3.0 percent (rule FUEL-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the retail_or_bunker_fuel_price observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: usd_thb_rate month over month change rises to or above +2.0 percent (rule FX-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the usd_thb_rate observation series in this platform

data_gaps: Overall source coverage is insufficient: no source in the registry is enabled, so every reading below is derived from labelled synthetic fixtures and describes the platform's behaviour, not the real world.

improvement_case.narrative: An improvement case for Thailand ↔ Mainland China and Hong Kong would show the same domains crossing their thresholds in the favourable direction, or an operating authority withdrawing a restriction. As with the deterioration case, the triggers are the monitorable part.

trigger_conditions.observable_via: the thailand_trade_value observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: port_throughput_volume year over year change rises to or above +7.5 percent (rule PORT-VOLUME-YOY-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the port_throughput_volume observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: container_freight_benchmark month over month change falls to or below -5.0 percent (rule FREIGHT-BENCHMARK-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the container_freight_benchmark observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: retail_or_bunker_fuel_price month over month change falls to or below -3.0 percent (rule FUEL-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the retail_or_bunker_fuel_price observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: usd_thb_rate month over month change falls to or below -2.0 percent (rule FX-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the usd_thb_rate observation series in this platform

data_gaps: Overall source coverage is insufficient: no source in the registry is enabled, so every reading below is derived from labelled synthetic fixtures and describes the platform's behaviour, not the real world.

known_limitations: Generated deterministically from this lane's domain directions, open events and data gaps. It is not an AI assessment and carries no judgement beyond the documented threshold rules it cites.
No quantitative Thailand trade ranking was retrieved under WO-010; the trade-value criterion is recorded as analytical inference, not as a measured ranking.
Resolution is country-level: the platform holds no Thailand port-pair statistics, so this lane must not be displayed as a port-pair lane.

preparedness_options.description: Organizations with cargo moving on Thailand ↔ Mainland China and Hong Kong may wish to track the domain readings and official notices recorded for this lane, so that a change is noticed when it occurs rather than afterwards.
preparedness_options.applicable_to: Organizations with exposure to Thailand ↔ Mainland China and Hong Kong
preparedness_options.trigger_condition: The lane is published with an attention level of watch or elevated, or any domain crosses its documented threshold.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: Earlier awareness of a change that is already observable in a public source.
tradeoffs: Requires ongoing attention to a lane that may not change.
limitations: This platform holds no shipment, booking or capacity data, so it cannot state whether any particular organization is exposed to this lane.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: The lane returns to a routine attention level and no official notice is open against its nodes or chokepoints.

preparedness_options.description: An organization may wish to establish, from its own records, whether its cargo actually routes through the nodes and chokepoints that Thailand ↔ Mainland China and Hong Kong includes, since public data cannot establish that.
preparedness_options.applicable_to: Organizations that may have exposure to Thailand ↔ Mainland China and Hong Kong
preparedness_options.trigger_condition: The lane is published at watch or elevated attention while the platform records no confirmation of which services actually transit its chokepoints.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: Replaces an assumed exposure with a known one before any decision depends on it.
tradeoffs: Requires internal information this public platform does not hold.
limitations: Routing information is carrier-specific and is not published by any source qualified in this registry.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: Exposure has been established from the organization's own records.

known_limitations: Generated deterministically from this lane's domain directions, open events and data gaps. It is not an AI assessment and carries no judgement beyond the documented threshold rules it cites.
No quantitative Thailand trade ranking was retrieved under WO-010, so the trade-value criterion was not applied to this lane; selection rests on the recorded structural criteria.
Resolution is regional: transshipment volumes attributable to Thailand cargo are not separable from any public source the platform has qualified.
A Singapore port notice is evidence of the notice, not automatically of an effect on Thailand cargo.

limitations: This platform holds no shipment, booking or capacity data, so it cannot state whether any particular organization is exposed to this lane.

preparedness_options.description: Where a lane transits a chokepoint with a registered notice channel, an organization may wish to understand in advance what an alternative routing would mean for its own transit-time assumptions.
preparedness_options.applicable_to: Organizations whose planning assumptions depend on Thailand ↔ ASEAN and Singapore transshipment transit times
preparedness_options.trigger_condition: An operating authority publishes a restriction affecting a chokepoint this lane transits.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: A planning assumption that is examined before it is tested rather than after.
tradeoffs: Alternative routings usually carry their own cost or transit penalty.
limitations: The platform does not model routings and publishes no transit-time estimate for any alternative.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: The restriction is withdrawn or the lane's exposure is retired.

preparedness_options.trigger_condition: The lane is published with an attention level of watch or elevated, or any domain crosses its documented threshold.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: Earlier awareness of a change that is already observable in a public source.
tradeoffs: Requires ongoing attention to a lane that may not change.
limitations: This platform holds no shipment, booking or capacity data, so it cannot state whether any particular organization is exposed to this lane.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: The lane returns to a routine attention level and no official notice is open against its nodes or chokepoints.

preparedness_options.description: An organization may wish to establish, from its own records, whether its cargo actually routes through the nodes and chokepoints that Thailand ↔ Middle East and Gulf includes, since public data cannot establish that.
preparedness_options.applicable_to: Organizations that may have exposure to Thailand ↔ Middle East and Gulf
preparedness_options.trigger_condition: The lane is published at watch or elevated attention while the platform records no confirmation of which services actually transit its chokepoints.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: Replaces an assumed exposure with a known one before any decision depends on it.
tradeoffs: Requires internal information this public platform does not hold.
limitations: Routing information is carrier-specific and is not published by any source qualified in this registry.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: Exposure has been established from the organization's own records.

preparedness_options.description: Where a lane transits a chokepoint with a registered notice channel, an organization may wish to understand in advance what an alternative routing would mean for its own transit-time assumptions.
preparedness_options.applicable_to: Organizations whose planning assumptions depend on Thailand ↔ Middle East and Gulf transit times
preparedness_options.trigger_condition: An operating authority publishes a restriction affecting a chokepoint this lane transits.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: A planning assumption that is examined before it is tested rather than after.
tradeoffs: Alternative routings usually carry their own cost or transit penalty.
limitations: The platform does not model routings and publishes no transit-time estimate for any alternative.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: The restriction is withdrawn or the lane's exposure is retired.

base_case.narrative: Thailand ↔ Northern Europe currently reads as deteriorating across the nine assessed domains, with the freight benchmark, capacity evidence and transit-time and service evidence deteriorating 2 operational event(s) are open against this lane: EVT-20231218-001, EVT-20240520-001. 1 of nine domains have insufficient evidence, so the reading is partial.

trigger_conditions.condition: any source backing this lane changes freshness state, or a new official notice is recorded against a node or chokepoint the lane includes
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the source-health snapshot and the official notice channels

data_gaps: Overall source coverage is insufficient: no source in the registry is enabled, so every reading below is derived from labelled synthetic fixtures and describes the platform's behaviour, not the real world.
base_case.point_forecast_disclaimer: No numeric forecast is given for freight, transit time, inventory or cost. No qualified dataset in this registry would support one.

deterioration_case.narrative: A deterioration case for Thailand ↔ Northern Europe would show the domains below crossing their documented thresholds in the adverse direction, or an operating authority extending a restriction that affects this lane. The triggers state what would have to be observed; no magnitude or date is asserted here.

trigger_conditions.condition: thailand_trade_value year over year change falls to or below -7.5 percent (rule TH-TRADE-YOY-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the thailand_trade_value observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: port_throughput_volume year over year change falls to or below -7.5 percent (rule PORT-VOLUME-YOY-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the port_throughput_volume observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: container_freight_benchmark month over month change rises to or above +5.0 percent (rule FREIGHT-BENCHMARK-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the container_freight_benchmark observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: retail_or_bunker_fuel_price month over month change rises to or above +3.0 percent (rule FUEL-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the retail_or_bunker_fuel_price observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: usd_thb_rate month over month change rises to or above +2.0 percent (rule FX-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the usd_thb_rate observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: the operating authority behind EVT-20231218-001 publishes a further notice extending or widening the restriction
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the official operational notice channel registered for that authority

trigger_conditions.condition: the operating authority behind EVT-20240520-001 publishes a further notice extending or widening the restriction
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the official operational notice channel registered for that authority

limitations: This platform holds no shipment, booking or capacity data, so it cannot state whether any particular organization is exposed to this lane.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: The lane returns to a routine attention level and no official notice is open against its nodes or chokepoints.

preparedness_options.description: An organization may wish to establish, from its own records, whether its cargo actually routes through the nodes and chokepoints that Thailand ↔ United States East and Gulf Coast includes, since public data cannot establish that.
preparedness_options.applicable_to: Organizations that may have exposure to Thailand ↔ United States East and Gulf Coast
preparedness_options.trigger_condition: The lane is published at watch or elevated attention while the platform records no confirmation of which services actually transit its chokepoints.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: Replaces an assumed exposure with a known one before any decision depends on it.
tradeoffs: Requires internal information this public platform does not hold.
limitations: Routing information is carrier-specific and is not published by any source qualified in this registry.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: Exposure has been established from the organization's own records.

preparedness_options.description: Where a lane transits a chokepoint with a registered notice channel, an organization may wish to understand in advance what an alternative routing would mean for its own transit-time assumptions.
preparedness_options.applicable_to: Organizations whose planning assumptions depend on Thailand ↔ United States East and Gulf Coast transit times
preparedness_options.trigger_condition: An operating authority publishes a restriction affecting a chokepoint this lane transits.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: A planning assumption that is examined before it is tested rather than after.
tradeoffs: Alternative routings usually carry their own cost or transit penalty.
limitations: The platform does not model routings and publishes no transit-time estimate for any alternative.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: The restriction is withdrawn or the lane's exposure is retired.

base_case.narrative: Thailand ↔ Australia and New Zealand currently reads as deteriorating across the nine assessed domains, with the freight benchmark and transit-time and service evidence deteriorating No operational event is currently open against this lane. 1 of nine domains have insufficient evidence, so the reading is partial.

trigger_conditions.observable_via: the source-health snapshot and the official notice channels

deterioration_case.narrative: A deterioration case for Thailand ↔ Australia and New Zealand would show the domains below crossing their documented thresholds in the adverse direction, or an operating authority extending a restriction that affects this lane. The triggers state what would have to be observed; no magnitude or date is asserted here.

trigger_conditions.condition: thailand_trade_value year over year change falls to or below -7.5 percent (rule TH-TRADE-YOY-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the thailand_trade_value observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: port_throughput_volume year over year change falls to or below -7.5 percent (rule PORT-VOLUME-YOY-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the port_throughput_volume observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: container_freight_benchmark month over month change rises to or above +5.0 percent (rule FREIGHT-BENCHMARK-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the container_freight_benchmark observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: retail_or_bunker_fuel_price month over month change rises to or above +3.0 percent (rule FUEL-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the retail_or_bunker_fuel_price observation series in this platform

trigger_conditions.condition: usd_thb_rate month over month change rises to or above +2.0 percent (rule FX-MOM-V1)
trigger_conditions.observable_via: the usd_thb_rate observation series in this platform

data_gaps: Overall source coverage is insufficient: no source in the registry is enabled, so every reading below is derived from labelled synthetic fixtures and describes the platform's behaviour, not the real world.

known_limitations: Generated deterministically from this lane's domain directions, open events and data gaps. It is not an AI assessment and carries no judgement beyond the documented threshold rules it cites.
No quantitative Thailand port or trade series was retrieved under WO-010, so data_period_used is null and the selection rests on the recorded structural criteria.
The Ocean module covers only the seaport leg. Inland road and rail drayage is a Land-module concern and is explicitly not assessed by WO-010.
This lane is mode-tagged 'sea' because only its seaport leg is in scope; the inland leg will require a separate road or rail lane record when the Land module is built.
